task_completion.description: The agent opens the Expenses module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Expenses dashboard or list view is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The agent locates the target expense record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The expense record with description 'Client Lunch', employee 'Marc Demo', and amount '$125.50' is visible in the list of expenses.

task_completion.description: The agent opens the target expense record to view its details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form view for the 'Client Lunch' expense is open, showing details like Employee (Marc Demo) and Total ($125.50).

task_completion.description: The agent selects the receipt file to attach.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file picker dialog or file manager is open, showing the selection of 'receipt_lunch.jpg' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

task_completion.description: The receipt file is successfully attached to the expense record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'receipt_lunch.jpg' file is listed as an attachment on the 'Client Lunch' expense record (e.g., in the chatter/attachment panel, or a receipt preview is visible).

integrity.description: The agent used the web UI to attach the receipt.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Odoo web interface and file picker/manager, not just a terminal window running API commands.

integrity.description: The attached file comes from the specified directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file picker or file manager shows the path '/home/ga/Documents/' when selecting 'receipt_lunch.jpg'.

integrity.description: The agent did not alter other expense records or the details of the target record.
integrity.visual_evidence: The details of the 'Client Lunch' expense (amount, employee, description) are not modified, and no other records appear changed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target employee: Marc Demo. Target expense description: Client Lunch. Target amount: $125.50. Receipt file path: /home/ga/Documents/receipt_lunch.jpg. Receipt filename: receipt_lunch.jpg.
